svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="Account Factory Architecture" id="account-factory"> <mxGraphModel dx="-494" dy="-156" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1400" pageHeight="1100" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="aws-cloud" parent="1" style="sketch=0;points=[[0,0],[0.25,0],[0.5,0],[0.75,0],[1,0],[1,0.25],[1,0.5],[1,0.75],[1,1],[0.75,1],[0.5,1],[0.25,1],[0,1],[0,0.75],[0,0.5],[0,0.25]];shape=mxgraph.aws4.group;grIcon=mxgraph.aws4.group_aws_cloud;strokeColor=#AAB7B8;fillColor=none;verticalAlign=top;align=left;spacingLeft=30;fontColor=#232F3E;fontStyle=1;fontSize=14;container=1;collapsible=0;recursiveResize=0;pointerEvents=0;" value="AWS Cloud" vertex="1" /> <mxCell id="region" parent="aws-cloud" style="sketch=0;shape=mxgraph.aws4.group;grIcon=mxgraph.aws4.group_region;strokeColor=#00A4A6;fillColor=none;verticalAlign=top;align=left;spacingLeft=30;fontColor=#147EBA;fontSize=12;dashed=1;container=1;collapsible=0;recursiveResize=0;pointerEvents=0;" value="Region (ap-northeast-1)" vertex="1" /> <mxCell id="mgmt-account" parent="region" style="sketch=0;outlineConnect=0;gradientColor=none;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;shape=mxgraph.aws4.group;strokeColor=#879196;fillColor=none;verticalAlign=top;align=left;spacingLeft=30;fontColor=#232F3E;dashed=0;container=1;collapsible=0;recursiveResize=0;pointerEvents=0;" value="Management Account" vertex="1" /> <mxCell id="service-catalog" parent="mgmt-account" style="sketch=0;outlineConnect=0;fontColor=#232F3E;gradientColor=none;fillColor=#ED7100;strokeColor=none;dashed=0;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;align=center;html=1;fontSize=11;fontStyle=0;aspect=fixed;pointerEvents=1;shape=mxgraph.aws4.service_catalog;" value="Service Catalog
Portfolio" vertex="1" /> <mxCell id="orch-layer" parent="mgmt-account" style="sketch=0;outlineConnect=0;gradientColor=none;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fontSize=11;fontStyle=0;shape=mxgraph.aws4.group;strokeColor=#FF4F8B;fillColor=#FFF0F5;verticalAlign=top;align=left;spacingLeft=30;fontColor=#232F3E;dashed=0;container=1;collapsible=0;recursiveResize=0;pointerEvents=0;" value="Orchestration Layer" vertex="1" /> <mxCell id="lambda-provisioning" parent="orch-layer" style="sketch=0;outlineConnect=0;fontColor=#232F3E;gradientColor=none;fillColor=#ED7100;strokeColor=none;dashed=0;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;align=center;html=1;fontSize=11;fontStyle=0;aspect=fixed;pointerEvents=1;shape=mxgraph.aws4.lambda_function;" value="Lambda Function
(Provisioning)" vertex="1" /> <mxCell id="lambda-status" parent="orch-layer" style="sketch=0;outlineConnect=0;fontColor=#232F3E;gradientColor=none;fillColor=#ED7100;strokeColor=none;dashed=0;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;align=center;html=1;fontSize=11;fontStyle=0;aspect=fixed;pointerEvents=1;shape=mxgraph.aws4.lambda_function;" value="Lambda Function
(Status Check)" vertex="1" /> <mxCell id="eventbridge" parent="orch-layer" style="sketch=0;outlineConnect=0;fontColor=#232F3E;gradientColor=none;fillColor=#FF4F8B;strokeColor=none;dashed=0;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;align=center;html=1;fontSize=11;fontStyle=0;aspect=fixed;pointerEvents=1;shape=mxgraph.aws4.eventbridge;" value="EventBridge Rule
(Status Checker)" vertex="1" /> <mxCell id="edge-eb-checker" edge="1" parent="orch-layer" source="eventbridge" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#545B64;fontSize=10;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;" target="lambda-status" value="7. Trigger Poll"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="storage-layer" parent="mgmt-account" style="sketch=0;outlineConnect=0;gradientColor=none;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fontSize=11;fontStyle=0;shape=mxgraph.aws4.group;strokeColor=#3F8624;fillColor=#F4FBF4;verticalAlign=top;align=left;spacingLeft=30;fontColor=#232F3E;dashed=0;container=1;collapsible=0;recursiveResize=0;pointerEvents=0;" value="Storage & Data" vertex="1" /> <mxCell id="s3-templates" parent="storage-layer" style="sketch=0;outlineConnect=0;fontColor=#232F3E;gradientColor=none;fillColor=#3F8624;strokeColor=none;dashed=0;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;align=center;html=1;fontSize=11;fontStyle=0;aspect=fixed;pointerEvents=1;shape=mxgraph.aws4.s3;" value="S3 Bucket
(CFn Templates)" vertex="1" /> <mxCell id="ddb-metadata" parent="storage-layer" style="sketch=0;outlineConnect=0;fontColor=#232F3E;gradientColor=none;fillColor=#C925D1;strokeColor=none;dashed=0;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;align=center;html=1;fontSize=11;fontStyle=0;aspect=fixed;pointerEvents=1;shape=mxgraph.aws4.dynamodb;" value="DynamoDB Table
(Account Metadata)" vertex="1" /> <mxCell id="monitor-layer" parent="mgmt-account" style="sketch=0;outlineConnect=0;gradientColor=none;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fontSize=11;fontStyle=0;shape=mxgraph.aws4.group;strokeColor=#E7157B;fillColor=#FFF5F5;verticalAlign=top;align=left;spacingLeft=30;fontColor=#232F3E;dashed=0;container=1;collapsible=0;recursiveResize=0;pointerEvents=0;" value="Monitoring & Notifications" vertex="1" /> <mxCell id="sns-notifications" parent="monitor-layer" style="sketch=0;outlineConnect=0;fontColor=#232F3E;gradientColor=none;fillColor=#FF4F8B;strokeColor=none;dashed=0;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;align=center;html=1;fontSize=11;fontStyle=0;aspect=fixed;pointerEvents=1;shape=mxgraph.aws4.sns;" value="SNS Topic
(Notifications)" vertex="1" /> <mxCell id="cloudwatch" parent="monitor-layer" style="sketch=0;outlineConnect=0;fontColor=#232F3E;gradientColor=none;fillColor=#E7157B;strokeColor=none;dashed=0;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;align=center;html=1;fontSize=11;fontStyle=0;aspect=fixed;pointerEvents=1;shape=mxgraph.aws4.cloudwatch_2;" value="CloudWatch
(Logs & Alarms)" vertex="1" /> <mxCell id="edge-sc-lambda" edge="1" parent="mgmt-account" source="service-catalog" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#545B64;fontSize=10;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;" target="lambda-provisioning" value="2. Trigger Launch"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="90" y="240" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge-lambda-s3" edge="1" parent="mgmt-account" source="lambda-provisioning" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeWidth=1;strokeColor=#3F8624;dashed=1;fontSize=10;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;" target="s3-templates" value="Read Templates"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="240" y="380" /> <mxPoint x="240" y="450" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge-lambda-ddb" edge="1" parent="mgmt-account" source="lambda-provisioning" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#C925D1;fontSize=10;exitX=0.75;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;" target="ddb-metadata" value="4. Store Metadata"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="275" y="370" /> <mxPoint x="540" y="370" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge-lambda-sns" edge="1" parent="mgmt-account" source="lambda-provisioning" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#FF4F8B;fontSize=10;exitX=0.25;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;" target="sns-notifications" value="5. Notify Launch"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="225" y="390" /> <mxPoint x="225" y="590" /> <mxPoint x="270" y="590" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge-checker-ddb" edge="1" parent="mgmt-account" source="lambda-status" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#C925D1;fontSize=10;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;" target="ddb-metadata" value="9. Update Status"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="570" y="370" /> <mxPoint x="540" y="370" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge-checker-sns" edge="1" parent="mgmt-account" source="lambda-status" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#FF4F8B;fontSize=10;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;" target="sns-notifications" value="10. Notify Success"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="570" y="590" /> <mxPoint x="270" y="590" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="organizations" parent="region" style="sketch=0;outlineConnect=0;fontColor=#232F3E;gradientColor=none;fillColor=#FF4F8B;strokeColor=none;dashed=0;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;align=center;html=1;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;aspect=fixed;pointerEvents=1;shape=mxgraph.aws4.organizations;" value="AWS Organizations" vertex="1" /> <mxCell id="root-ou" parent="region" style="sketch=0;outlineConnect=0;gradientColor=none;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fontSize=11;fontStyle=0;shape=mxgraph.aws4.group;strokeColor=#FF4F8B;fillColor=none;verticalAlign=top;align=left;spacingLeft=30;fontColor=#232F3E;dashed=1;container=1;collapsible=0;recursiveResize=0;pointerEvents=0;" value="Root OU" vertex="1" /> <mxCell id="workload-ou" parent="region" style="sketch=0;outlineConnect=0;gradientColor=none;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fontSize=11;fontStyle=0;shape=mxgraph.aws4.group;strokeColor=#FF4F8B;fillColor=none;verticalAlign=top;align=left;spacingLeft=30;fontColor=#232F3E;dashed=1;container=1;collapsible=0;recursiveResize=0;pointerEvents=0;" value="Workload OU" vertex="1" /> <mxCell id="baseline-config" parent="region" style="sketch=0;outlineConnect=0;gradientColor=none;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fontSize=11;fontStyle=0;shape=mxgraph.aws4.group;strokeColor=#545B64;fillColor=#F8F9FA;verticalAlign=top;align=left;spacingLeft=30;fontColor=#232F3E;dashed=0;container=1;collapsible=0;recursiveResize=0;pointerEvents=0;" value="Baseline Configurations (StackSet)" vertex="1" /> <mxCell id="stackset" parent="baseline-config" style="sketch=0;outlineConnect=0;fontColor=#232F3E;gradientColor=none;fillColor=#FF4F8B;strokeColor=none;dashed=0;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;align=center;html=1;fontSize=11;fontStyle=0;aspect=fixed;pointerEvents=1;shape=mxgraph.aws4.cloudformation;" value="CloudFormation

Deploy Baseline"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="250" y="455" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge-stackset-member-1" edge="1" parent="region" source="stackset" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#FF4F8B;dashed=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;" target="baseline-stack-1" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="940" y="540" /> <mxPoint x="835" y="540" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge-stackset-member-2" edge="1" parent="region" source="stackset" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#FF4F8B;dashed=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;" target="baseline-stack-2" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge-stackset-member-3" edge="1" parent="region" source="stackset" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#FF4F8B;dashed=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;" target="baseline-stack-3" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="940" y="540" /> <mxPoint x="1045" y="540" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="engineer" parent="1" style="sketch=0;outlineConnect=0;fontColor=#232F3E;gradientColor=none;fillColor=#232F3D;strokeColor=none;dashed=0;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;align=center;html=1;fontSize=12;fontStyle=0;aspect=fixed;pointerEvents=1;shape=mxgraph.aws4.users;" value="Platform Engineer
/ End User" vertex="1" /> <mxCell id="edge-user-sc" edge="1" parent="1" source="engineer" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#545B64;fontSize=10;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="service-catalog" value="1. Request Account"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
